---
title: "Teaching"
---

[**GV248 - Power and Politics in the Modern World: Comparative Perspectives**](https://www.lse.ac.uk/resources/calendar/courseGuides/GV/2025_GV248.htm) \[2024-2026\]

A broad introduction to comparative politics covering:

-   Social and Political Revolutions
-   Natural Resources and Rentier States
-   Political and Bureaucratic Corruption
-   Political Economy of Distribution
-   Political Ideologies
